73-04-24 Moon 1974-02-10 Mars 1975-06-12 Rahu
1976-05-18
Satu 1978-10-11 Merc 1981-10-14 Ketu 1984-06-23 Venu 1985-08-02
Sun 1988-10-02
Moon 1989-09-14 Mars 1991-04-15 Rahu 1992-05-24 Jupi
1995-03-31
Merc 1997-10-11 Ketu 2000-03-09 Venu 2001-03-06 Sun 2004-01-05
Moon 2004-11-10

Mars 2006-04-12 Rahu 2007-04-09 Jupi 2009-10-26
Satu 2012-02-01
The dasa of 3 6 8 and 12 lord will lead to wars and if the
seventh lord is affected this will also increase the
chances of war.
The century was born in amavasaya tithi, which is
considered highly in auspicious.
First of all it was dasa of mars the third and 8th lord
which had caused wars and this was from 1937 -1944 with
start of rahu dasa the war had ended.
Secondly all the planets were in eight house from lagna
when the war started.
In the First World War 1914 - 1918 this was the period of
Saturn, which is the sixth lord antra followed by the
mercury, which was grahayuda with rahu.
Remember when tenth lord is affected in kings chart there
